info.description:
Rest service and graph database for organizing content.

When you remove an entity, its associations are also deleted. E.g., if you remove a subject, its associations to any topics are removed. The topics themselves are not affected.
info.title: NDLA Taxonomy API

post.summary: Updates average tree for all nodes. Requires taxonomy:admin access.
Updates average tree for the provided node. Requires taxonomy:admin access.

get.summary: Updates contexts for all roots. Requires taxonomy:admin access.

connectionId.description: The id of the subject-topic or topic-subtopic connection

isPrimary.description: True if owned by this topic, false if it has its primary connection elsewhere

paths.description: The path part of the url for the subject or subtopic connected to this topic

targetId.description: The id of the connected subject or topic

type.description: The type of connection (parent, child, referrer or target

ContextPOST.description: object containing public id of the node to be registered as context

customFields.description: Custom fields, Only updated if present

grepCodes.description: Set of grep codes, Only updated if present

visible.description: Visibility of the node, Only updated if present

baseName.description: The stored name of the node

breadcrumbs.description: List of names in the path

contentUri.description: ID of content introducing this node. Must be a valid URI, but preferably not a URL.

context.description: The context object selected when fetching node

contextId.description: An id unique for this context.

contextids.description: A list of all contextids this node has ever had

contexts.description: A list of all contexts this node is part of

defaultUrl.description: A pretty url based on the name and context in the default language.

defaultUrlName.description: Url safe name for the node in the default language.

gradeAverage.description: A number representing the average grade of all children nodes recursively.

language.description: The language code for which name is returned

name.description: The possibly translated name of the node

path.description: The primary path for this node. Can be empty if no context

paths.description: List of all paths to this node

supportedLanguages.description: List of language codes supported by translations

technicalEvaluation.description: The technical evaluation of the node.

url.description: A pretty url based on name and context. Empty if no context.

urlName.description: Url safe names for the node.

parentId.description: Parent id in the current context, null if none exists

path.description: The primary path for this node. Can be empty if no context

paths.description: List of all paths to this node

rank.description: The order in which to sort the node within it's level.

supportedLanguages.description: List of language codes supported by translations

technicalEvaluation.description: The technical evaluation of the node.

rank.description: Order in which subtopic is sorted for the topic
Order in which to sort the child for the parent
Order in which subtopic is sorted for the topic

contentUri.description: ID of content introducing this node. Must be a valid URI, but preferably not a URL.

context.description: The node is the root in a context. Default is false. Only used if present.

language.description: The language used at create time. Used to set default translation.

name.description: The name of the node. Required on create.

nodeId.description: If specified, set the node_id to this value. If omitted, an uuid will be assigned automatically.

qualityEvaluation.description: The quality evaluation of the node. Consist of a score from 1 to 5 and a comment. Can be null to remove existing evaluation.

resourceTypes.description: ResourceType public ids to assign to the node. Only works for nodes of type RESOURCE

root.description: The node is a root node. Default is false. Only used if present.

technicalEvaluation.description: The technical evaluation of the node. Contains a flag and an optional comment. Can be null to remove existing evaluation.

translations.description: The translations for the node. Contains an array of translations in different languages

visible.description: The node is visible. Default is true.

customFields.description: If specified, the search result will be filtered by whether they include the key,value combination provided. If more than one provided only one will be required (OR)

pageSize.description: How many results to return per page

parentId.description: Id to parent id in context.

rootId.description: Id to root id in context.

baseName.description: The stored name of the node

breadcrumbs.description: List of names in the path

contentUri.description: ID of content introducing this node. Must be a valid URI, but preferably not a URL.

context.description: The context object selected when fetching node

contextId.description: An id unique for this context.

contextids.description: A list of all contextids this node has ever had

contexts.description: A list of all contexts this node is part of

defaultUrl.description: A pretty url based on the name and context in the default language.

defaultUrlName.description: Url safe name for the node in the default language.

gradeAverage.description: A number representing the average grade of all children nodes recursively.

language.description: The language code for which name is returned

name.description: The possibly translated name of the node

parents.description: Parent topology nodes and whether or not connection type is primary

path.description: The primary path for this node. Can be empty if no context

paths.description: List of all paths to this node

supportedLanguages.description: List of language codes supported by translations

technicalEvaluation.description: The technical evaluation of the node.

url.description: A pretty url based on name and context. Empty if no context.

urlName.description: Url safe names for the node.

id.description: Specifies if node is core or supplementary

supportedLanguages.description: List of language codes supported by translations

contentUri.description: The ID of this element in the system where the content is stored. This ID should be of the form 'urn:<system>:<id>', where <system> is a short identifier for the system, and <id> is the id of this content in that system.

exactMatch.description: Is this an exact match for the provided path? False if this is another path to the same resource.

id.description: ID of the element referred to by the given path

name.description: Element name. For performance reasons, this name is for informational purposes only. To get a translated name, please fetch the resolved resource using its rest resource.

parents.description: Parent elements of the resolved element. The first element is the parent, the second is the grandparent, etc.

id.description: Resource to resource type connection id

name.description: The name of the resource type

order.description: Sort order of the resource type

supportedLanguages.description: List of language codes supported by translations

translations.description: All translations of this resource type

connectionId.description: The id of the resource resource type connection

name.description: The name of the resource type

order.description: Internal order of the resource types

supportedLanguages.description: List of language codes supported by translations

translations.description: All translations of this resource type

totalCount.example: Total search result count, useful for fetching multiple pages

breadcrumbs.description: A breadcrumb of the names of the context's parents

connectionId.description: The id of the parent connection object

contextId.description: Unique id of context based on root + parent connection

defaultUrl.description: Pretty-url of this particular context in the default language

id.description: The publicId of the node connected via content-uri

isActive.description: Whether the parent connection is marked as active

isArchived.description: Whether the root is marked as archived

isPrimary.description: Whether the parent connection is primary or not

isVisible.description: Whether the parent connection is visible or not

parents.description: List of all parents to this context. Empty if node is fetched as child

publicId.description: The publicId of the node connected via content-uri

rank.description: The rank of the parent connection object

relevance.description: Name of the relevance of the parent connection

relevanceId.description: Id of the relevance of the parent connection

root.description: The name of the root parent of the context

rootId.description: The publicId of the root parent of the context

contextId.description: Unique id of context based on root + parent connection

comment.description: Notes for the technical evaluation of this node.

requiresEvaluation.description: Whether this node requires a technical evaluation.

name.description: The translated name of the node
The translated name of the element. Used wherever translated texts are used.

nodeId.description: Node URN for resource in new system

subjectId.description: Subject URN for resource in new system (optional)

url.description: URL for resource in old system

archived.description: Timestamp for when version was archived

created.description: Timestamp for when version was created

published.description: Timestamp for when version was published

id.description: If specified, set the id to this value. Must start with urn:version: and be a valid URI. If omitted, an id will be assigned automatically.

locked.description: If specified, set the locked property to this value

id.description: If specified, set the id to this value. Must start with urn:version: and be a valid URI. If omitted, an id will be assigned automatically.

locked.description: If specified, set the locked property to this value

name.description: If specified, set the name to this value.
